name: 1inch
tagline: Get DEX swap quotes and token prices
description: Get a 1inch Classic Swap quote between two tokens on a chain, and look up current spot prices for tokens on a chain.

auth.hint: Create an application and API key in the 1inch Developer Portal and send it as Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>.

tools.name: get_swap_quote
tools.description: Get a Classic Swap quote for converting one token to another on a given chain.

params.name: chain
params.description: EVM chain ID, such as 1 for Ethereum mainnet.

params.name: src
params.description: Contract address of the token to swap from.

params.name: dst
params.description: Contract address of the token to swap to.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount to swap, in the source token's smallest unit (wei).

tools.name: get_token_prices
tools.description: Get current spot prices (in wei) for one or more tokens on a chain.

params.name: chain
params.description: EVM chain ID, such as 1 for Ethereum mainnet.

params.name: addresses
params.description: Comma-separated token contract addresses; omit to return whitelisted token prices.
